title: Gateway Model Map (slim)
description: Structural model-identity map for gateway routing. Single gateway (kie) = no price layer. Each row maps a canonical model id to its kie slash-id, capability, per-model input fields, and reference-field arities (which differ per model and MUST be confirmed from that model's docs.kie.ai page, not guessed).

kie_model.description: Exact slash-id used in createTask `model`, e.g. bytedance/seedance-2

category_tags.description: Navigation tags — every category this model serves; lets the agent find a model by category. Shared models carry multiple tags (one model, many categories).

input_fields.description: Whitelist of input keys this model accepts (the tool sends only these).

reference_fields.description: reference-array field name -> max arity (for character-lock / multi-ref).

params.description: Human notes on allowed scalar params.

defaults.description: Field -> default value the tool fills in when the caller omits that field. Covers params the API requires but that look optional (e.g. kling-3.0 multi_shots: 422 if absent). Only fields also listed in input_fields are applied; an explicit caller value always wins.

param_specs.description: Per-parameter knowledge map (the agent's source of truth for every controllable knob): exact kie param name -> {type, values, default, required, cost, note}. `required` reflects what the model's docs page TRULY enforces (not just JSON-schema 'required'), so it captures required-but-looks-optional traps. `cost`: 'yes' = spend-driving lever (minimize for cheap runs), 'flat' = measured no-op on price, 'verify' = plausible lever that is UNMEASURED (verify-at-build). Anything unconfirmable from docs is 'not stated' / flagged verify-at-build in `note`.

values.description: Enum options / numeric range / size+format constraints.

required.description: TRULY required per the model's docs page.

cost.description: yes=spend lever, flat=measured no-op, verify=unmeasured lever.

est_cost_usd.description: Best-effort per-run USD. null = credit-metered (USD varies by credit-package price).

est_cost_credits.description: Measured kie credit cost per run (empirical, from /chat/credit delta). null = not yet measured.

cost_note.description: Free-text note on cost provenance (e.g. measured vs doc figure).

source.description: docs.kie.ai page the row was confirmed from.
